sections.paragraph:
Original: נעל

Transliteration: nâ‛al

Phonetic: naw-al'

BDB Definition:

  1. to bar, lock, bolt
    1. (Qal) to bar, lock, bolt
  2. to furnish with sandals, shoe
    1. (Qal) to shoe
    2. (Hiphil) to give sandals

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1383,1383b

Part(s) of speech: Verb
